title: trichocentrum loyolicum
intro: Trichocentrum loyolicum, also known as the Yellow Egerton Orchid or more commonly as the "Cattleya loyolii", is a species of orchid native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties due to its potential in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as wound healing, pain relief, and antiseptic properties. Trichocentrum loyolicum can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and ointments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
